steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The goal is clear: the student must show that both soundscapes are on the list by naming both specific soundscapes.

steps.title: Evaluate which choice accomplishes this
steps.content:
Only C names both the sound of cicadas at the Yama-dera temple and the sound of birds at the Higashiyama Botanical Garden while explicitly stating both are on the list.

The other choices fail to convey that both soundscapes are on the list—either by not mentioning the specific soundscapes or by naming only one.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
